isolation.mode: read-only validation (navigation, inspection, hover, screenshots, computed-style/DOM audits)

steps.action: Open /WEA/dashboard and inspect indicator styles for Active Executive, Idle Executive, and Error Executive rows
steps.expected: Indicators render at 6x6 with border-radius 0; alive/error/idle semantics mapped to design tokens
steps.observed: Active indicators rendered 6px x 6px with rgb(130,232,138), error indicator rendered 6px x 6px with rgb(255,96,96), idle indicator rendered 6px x 6px transparent with 1px muted border; all had borderRadius 0px

steps.action: Inspect DOM order in Executive/Leads/Workers tier columns on /WEA/dashboard
steps.expected: Within each tier: active/running first, then waiting, then idle/completed
steps.observed: Executive tier order was Active Executive(active) then CEO(idle) then Idle Executive(idle) then Error Executive(error); Leads tier contained CTO(pending_approval/waiting) only; Workers was empty

assertions.title: Active agents expanded, idle agents collapsed

steps.action: Load /WEA/dashboard and capture default block state
steps.expected: Active agents expanded by default and idle agents collapsed
steps.observed: Default state showed all cards collapsed (Active Executive, CEO, Idle Executive, Error Executive, CTO); no active card was expanded
Idle Executive expanded after click while remaining cards stayed collapsed

assertions.issues: Assertion requires active agents to be expanded by default; current dashboard default renders active agents collapsed.

assertions.title: Stream content color coding

steps.action: Expand Active Executive card on /WEA/dashboard and audit stream lines
steps.expected: Expanded block contains reasoning (--fg-muted), tool calls (--warn with $), indented tool results (--fg-dim), and errors (--dead)
steps.observed: Expanded Active Executive block contained only metadata (role/adapter) and no transcript stream lines; no $-prefixed tool calls, no reasoning, and no error/result lines were present

assertions.issues: Required stream transcript content types were absent in expanded dashboard agent block.

assertions.title: Run transcript terminal style

steps.action: Navigate to /WEA/agents/ceo/runs, expand command-detail items, and audit transcript typography/color tokens
steps.expected: Run transcript uses JetBrains Mono with reasoning in --fg-muted, tool calls in --warn with $ prefix, and errors in --dead
steps.observed: Transcript rendered in JetBrains Mono and included warn/dead token usage on tags, but no $-prefixed tool-call lines were found (count=0) and error narrative text was not consistently rendered in --dead

assertions.issues: Transcript formatting does not satisfy the contract requirement for $-prefixed warn-colored tool calls, and error-body text is not consistently dead-colored.

frictions.description: `agent-browser network requests --json` returned an empty request list for this session.
frictions.resolution: Captured network evidence with read-only curl checks against relevant /api endpoints and recorded status codes in network-curl-status.txt.

frictions.description: Initial run-endpoint probes using shorthand IDs/path guesses returned 404/500 responses.
frictions.resolution: Extracted full run UUID from UI link href and re-ran checks against /api/heartbeat-runs/{runId} and /events, both returning 200.

summary: Tested 5 assertions: 2 passed (VAL-GUI-FOUND-004, VAL-GUI-DASH-005) and 3 failed (VAL-GUI-DASH-006, VAL-GUI-DASH-007, VAL-GUI-AGDET-003).
